name: claudemax
description: Anthropic-native power-user harness for Claude Max subscribers. Multispec engine + parallel /goal + blind /verify on Opus 4.7. 29-skill catalog, bundled llm-dark-patterns hooks, two parallelism modes (SDK subagents + Claude Code Agent Teams).
_schemaNote: This manifest follows the Claude Code plugin format introduced in v2.1.129 (https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/blob/main/plugins/README.md). Field names are best-effort against public docs as of 2026-05-20; validate with `claude plugin validate plugin.json` once that command stabilizes. Plugin marketplace publication path: https://claudemarketplaces.com/
